title: Ubiquiti Junction Utility, indoor/outdoor enclosure, IP55 rating
description: Ubiquiti UACC-Junction-Utility is an indoor/outdoor enclosure with IP55 rating designed for housing Ubiquiti active network components. It is intended for wall mounting UA-Hub-Gate UA-Hub-Door UA-Hub-Door-Mini UA-SK-Elevator UACC-Retrofit-PoE-2Wire UACC-AE USW-Flex USW-Ultra USW-Ultra-210W USW-Flex-2.5G-8-POE USW-Ultra-60W GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
